SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER (SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS) THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: THE REQUEST IS DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUY, NOAH DBA JOSHU + VELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES AKA JAMES M. PATOCK DBA ARC METALWORKS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
